title: fragaria vesca var. nuda
intro: Fragaria vesca var. nuda, also known as the naked wood strawberry, is a variety of wild strawberry that is characterized by its lack of hairs on its leaves and stems. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca var. nuda include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
